name: Set of 2 Wood with Metal Base Dining Chair Natural - Room Essentials™
description:
Set up a simple yet sleek dining space with the 2-Pack of Wood with Metal Base Dining Chair from Room Essentials™. This pack of two dining chairs features an armless design with a black metal frame to complement your decor. Designed with a wooden seat and back, this dining chair set helps create a perfect dining setting for two. Add a round table to complete the look of the space.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall height: 31"
Overall depth: 19.5"
Overall width: 16.75"
Seat depth: 15.75"
Seat width: 15.5"
Seat height: 18"
Back width: 15.35"
Back height: 5.5"
